description_long: This object is a modern grave monument set on a rectangular stone base, featuring a raised platform of polished gray granite. At the head of the grave, two vertical black stone slabs rise, one taller than the other, with a clean, geometric cutout forming a cross in the taller slab. The monument's surfaces are smooth and reflective, suggesting high-quality stonework. The grave is bordered by a slightly elevated frame, also in gray stone, which visually separates it from the surrounding ground. The overall design is minimalist, with sharp lines and a strong contrast between the black and gray stone elements. There are no visible inscriptions or decorative motifs aside from the cross cutout.
description: A modern grave monument with a raised gray granite platform and two vertical black stone slabs, one featuring a cross cutout. The design is minimalist, with smooth, polished surfaces and strong color contrast.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two black vertical slabs, with the taller slab featuring a cross cutout, and the gray stone platform extending forward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the black slabs and the layered structure of the gray stone platform and base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the gray stone platform and the back of the black slabs, with the cross cutout visible in silhouette.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the monument's depth and the clean, geometric lines of the stonework.
